pi_items.source: Magento official documentation (Adobe Commerce), verified through multiple authoritative sources. Configuration path controls the 'Enable Terms and Conditions' setting in Stores > Configuration > Sales > Checkout > Checkout Options.
Task description explicitly states: Name: 'Handmade Goods Terms of Service'. The metadata partial string correctly matches the full agreement name.

pi_items.metadata_value: Terms of Service for handmade goods
pi_items.verified_value: Terms of Service for handmade goods
pi_items.source: Task description states: Checkbox Text: 'I agree to the Terms of Service for handmade goods'. The metadata partial is a substring of the required checkbox text. Verifier checks for case-insensitive presence of 'terms of service' and 'handmade'.
Task description requires: 'Must include an <h2> heading 'Terms of Service'...'. The <h2 tag check ensures HTML formatting is used.
Task description explicitly requires the H2 heading text: 'Terms of Service'.
Task description requires: 'mention shipping takes '2-4 weeks''. Verifier also accepts '2 to 4 weeks' as alternative format.
Task description requires: 'specify a '14 days' return window'.
Task description explicitly states: Name: 'Privacy and Data Policy'. The metadata partial string correctly matches the full agreement name.

pi_items.metadata_value: agree to the Privacy and Data Policy
pi_items.verified_value: agree to the Privacy and Data Policy
pi_items.source: Task description states: Checkbox Text: 'I have read and agree to the Privacy and Data Policy'. The metadata partial is a substring of the required checkbox text. Verifier checks for case-insensitive presence of 'privacy' and 'data'.
Task description requires: 'Must include an <h2> heading 'Privacy Policy'...'. The <h2 tag check ensures HTML formatting is used.
Task description explicitly requires the H2 heading text: 'Privacy Policy'.

privileged_info_summary: The checkout_agreements task is a medium-difficulty interactive configuration task in a real Magento e-commerce environment. The task requires: (1) enabling the Terms and Conditions feature via configuration path 'checkout/options/enable_agreements', (2) creating 'Handmade Goods Terms of Service' agreement with specific HTML content including h2 heading, explanation of handmade items, 2-4 weeks shipping time, and 14-day return window, and (3) creating 'Privacy and Data Policy' agreement with h2 heading and mentions of data collection and cookie usage. The verifier checks configuration enablement (15 pts), agreement 1 settings and content (40 pts), agreement 2 settings and content (40 pts), and store view assignments (5 pts) with a pass threshold of 60 pts.
